name: Sonmez Pamuklu Sanayii A.S.
summary: S√É¬∂nmez Pamuklu Sanayii A.S. manufactures and sells yarns in Turkey. It also produces viscose, tencel, modal, micromodal, microtencel, acrylic, wool, silk, linen, elastane, bamboo, and polyester fibers. The company was founded in 1981 and is based in Bursa, Turkey.
